card.name: Whispered Secrets
card.oracle_text:
Delve
Draw two cards.
card.flavor_text: Knowledge flows like water through the cracks of memory.
card.design_notes: Blue common instant with Delve that provides card advantage. The high base cost of {4}{U} makes Delve meaningful - players can exile 3-4 cards to cast this for {1}{U} or {2}{U}, making it an efficient draw spell in the late game. Simple single ability keeps it at common complexity.

card.name: Graveyard Scavenger
card.oracle_text:
Delve
When ~ enters, target opponent discards a card and you gain 2 life.
card.flavor_text: It feeds on both flesh and memory, leaving nothing but emptiness behind.
card.design_notes: Black uncommon creature with Delve and graveyard-themed ETB. The 3/2 body for potentially {1}{B} is reasonable with Delve. The ETB combines black's discard theme with minor lifegain, creating graveyard interaction while providing immediate value. Multi-ability design fits uncommon complexity.

card.name: Nature's Grand Convergence
card.oracle_text:
Convoke
Search your library for up to three creature cards with different names and put them onto the battlefield. Then shuffle.
Creatures you control get +2/+2 and trample until end of turn.
card.design_notes: Green rare sorcery with Convoke that creates a massive board presence. The high cost {6}{G}{G} becomes manageable with creature help via Convoke, fitting green's creature-based ramp philosophy. Tutoring multiple creatures plus anthem effect creates a splashy rare-worthy impact. Multi-ability design tests Convoke with complex effects.

card.name: Rally the Faithful
card.oracle_text:
Convoke
Whenever a creature you control attacks, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token that's tapped and attacking.
card.flavor_text: Each charge inspires ten more to follow.
card.design_notes: White uncommon enchantment with Convoke and token generation. The triggered ability rewards aggressive strategies by creating exponential token growth - each attacking creature makes another attacker. Convoke helps deploy it early with creatures that immediately benefit. Multi-ability design fits uncommon, combining white's token and aggressive themes.

card.name: Stormfire Adept
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, ~ deals 1 damage to any target and gains haste until end of turn.
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Lightning flows through her veins, and chaos through her thoughts.
card.design_notes: Red rare creature with Prowess-like triggered ability plus unique combat damage trigger. The spell trigger provides immediate value and enables attacks, while the combat trigger offers red's impulsive card selection. Multi-ability design creates build-around potential for spellslinger decks. Stats are modest to balance the powerful effects at rare.

card.name: Skywatch Griffin
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Vigilance
card.flavor_text: Ever watchful, the griffins of Skywatch Keep guard the mountain passes from dawn to dusk.
card.design_notes: White common flyer that's mechanically distinct from Radiant Pegasus. Uses vigilance instead of lifelink, trading the lifegain utility for the ability to attack and still defend. Stats are aggressive (2/1 for 3) but reasonable for common, giving white a solid aerial threat.

card.name: Nullify
card.oracle_text: Counter target creature or enchantment spell.
card.flavor_text: "Some threats are best dealt with before they manifest." —Archmage Thessarian
card.design_notes: Blue counterspell that's mechanically distinct from Dispel the Weave. Instead of taxing any spell, this hard counters but only hits creatures and enchantments. More focused but reliable, fitting uncommon power level. Cheaper cost makes it playable.

card.name: Wither Away
card.oracle_text: Destroy target creature with toughness 2 or less.
card.flavor_text: In the cursed marshlands, even the strongest warriors find their strength slowly ebbing away.
card.design_notes: Black removal that's different from Fatal Strike (which targets by mana value). This targets by toughness, making it better against cheap utility creatures but worse against expensive low-toughness threats. 1 mana cost makes it efficient for common, but the restriction keeps it balanced.

card.name: Ember Blast
card.oracle_text: ~ deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
card.flavor_text: The draconic forges burn hot enough to melt steel and sear flesh.
card.design_notes: Red burn spell distinct from Molten Bolt. Does more damage (3 vs 2) but costs more (2 vs 1) and can't target players, only creatures/planeswalkers. This gives red good creature removal at common while maintaining the color's identity of not being the best at unconditional removal.

card.name: Thornwood Bear
card.oracle_text: Trample
card.flavor_text: The bears of Thornwood have learned to push through any obstacle in their path to food.
card.design_notes: Green common beater that's simple and efficient. 2/2 trample for 2 mana follows the classic green template (like Kalonian Tusker's lineage). Trample is perfect for green's philosophy of breaking through with large creatures. Stats are fair for common - not undercosted but solid.

card.name: Skyward Commander
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When ~ enters, other creatures you control with flying get +1/+1 until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "Rise above the battlefield, and victory shall follow."

card.name: Gravecaller Mystic
card.oracle_text:
When ~ enters, mill two cards.
When ~ dies, you may return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: Death is but another library to explore.

card.name: Bloodpact Marauder
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you sacrifice a creature, ~ deals 1 damage to each opponent.
{1}, Sacrifice a creature: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Primal Bruiser
card.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever ~ or another creature with power 4 or greater enters under your control, ~ deals 2 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: Size matters when the ground shakes beneath your feet.

card.name: Grove Captain
card.oracle_text:
Convoke
When ~ enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
Other creatures you control get +1/+0.
card.flavor_text: Unity in numbers, strength in purpose.

card.name: Twilight Inquisitor
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "In darkness or light, the truth demands its price."
card.design_notes: WB signpost for life manipulation archetype. Lifelink provides consistent lifegain, while the combat trigger creates additional drain effects. At 2/2 for 3 mana, it's aggressively costed to encourage attacking. The triggered ability creates incremental advantage and fits WB's drain theme.

card.name: Stormcaller Adept
card.oracle_text:
Prowess
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, ~ gets +1/+0 until end of turn and deals 1 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: Lightning follows thought as surely as thunder follows lightning.
card.design_notes: UR signpost for spells matter archetype. Prowess provides consistent growth, while the triggered ability rewards instant/sorcery casting with both offensive power and direct damage. The 1 damage trigger fits red's direct damage identity while blue provides the spell synergy framework.

card.name: Graveroot Shaman
card.oracle_text:
When ~ enters, mill three cards.
{2}{B}{G}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: Death feeds the roots, and the roots remember all.
card.design_notes: BG signpost for graveyard recursion archetype. ETB mill fills the graveyard (green self-mill + black graveyard interaction), while the activated ability provides repeatable recursion. High toughness encourages defensive play and protects the recursion engine. The activation cost requires both colors to emphasize multicolor identity.

card.name: Weaponmaster Veteran
card.oracle_text:
Whenever ~ becomes equipped, it gains haste until end of turn.
Whenever ~ attacks, if it's equipped, it deals 1 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: "A blade is only as sharp as the hand that wields it."
card.design_notes: RW signpost for aggro equipment archetype. First ability provides immediate attack capability when equipped (red haste + white equipment synergy). Second ability rewards equipped attacking with direct damage, combining red's aggressive damage with white's equipment theme. Solid 2/3 body for aggressive strategies.

card.name: Verdant Archivist
card.oracle_text:
When ~ enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Knowledge grows in the spaces between root and stone.
card.design_notes: GU signpost for ramp/card advantage archetype. ETB provides immediate ramp (green's strength), while the landfall trigger converts land drops into cards (blue's card draw + green's land synergy). High toughness and low power encourage defensive/value play. Creates strong synergy with additional land drops and ramp spells.
